name: Mudslime
lore: Mudslime. A friendly blob of goo.
notes: Failed breed result — incompatible parents produce this

name: Mirror Slime
lore: Mirror Slime. A remarkable slime seldom seen in the wild.
notes: Breed a slime with the result of breeding that slime — self-reflective chain

name: Glitch Slime
lore: Glitch Slime. An extraordinary slime of considerable power.
notes: Tap the main blob exactly 999 times without spending any Goo

name: Lucky Slime
lore: Lucky Slime. A remarkable slime seldom seen in the wild.
notes: 0.1% chance to appear on any successful breed

name: Oversized Slime
lore: Oversized Slime. A slightly unusual slime with a curious personality.
notes: Triggered by having 100+ slimes in collection simultaneously

name: Miniature Slime
lore: Miniature Slime. A slightly unusual slime with a curious personality.
notes: Triggered when any slime reaches level 10 for the first time

name: Elder Slime
lore: Elder Slime. A remarkable slime seldom seen in the wild.
notes: A single slime remains at max level for 24 real-world hours

name: Haunted Slime
lore: Haunted Slime. An extraordinary slime of considerable power.
notes: Discovered in Frostmere — breed any two slimes after midnight local time

name: Curious Slime
lore: Curious Slime. A remarkable slime seldom seen in the wild.
notes: Tap the same slime 50 consecutive times without tapping anything else

name: Slime King
lore: Slime King. An extraordinary slime of considerable power.
notes: Unlock all 25 Zone 3 slimes (all of Ember Wastes)

name: Slime Queen
lore: Slime Queen. An extraordinary slime of considerable power.
notes: Unlock all 25 Zone 4 slimes (all of Frostmere)

name: Ancient Slime
lore: Ancient Slime. A legendary being spoken of in ancient slime tales.

name: Cosmic Jester Slime
lore: Cosmic Jester Slime. A remarkable slime seldom seen in the wild.
notes: Breed any slime with a Mudslime

name: Primordial Goo
lore: Primordial Goo. A mythic entity beyond all ordinary understanding.
notes: Collect all 6 zone apex Epics: Meadow Crown + Sapphire Heart + Hellfire + Frostbite Sovereign + Jungle Sovereign + Cosmic Singularity

name: The Great Slime (True Form)
lore: The Great Slime (True Form). A mythic entity beyond all ordinary understanding.
notes: Complete the Slimepedia — collect all 526 other slimes. This is the true ending.
